title: Irrigation
description: The Irrigation function block is used to control an irrigation system, for example in your garden.

inputs.description: Activates irrigation. Starts only if there was insufficient rain, and no sufficient amount of rain is expected.
Activates valve (V1-8). 0 - deactivates all valves 9 - activates all valves
Input for the expected amount of precipitation in the next hours
Input for a rain sensor or equivalent information. Used to determine the rain duration.
Pulse: Outputs are reset / switched off. On: Block is locked. Dominating input. The name of the connected sensor is used in the user interface.

outputs.description: Currently active valve 0 - All off 9 - All on
Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

parameters.summary: Maximum precipitation in the next set hours
parameters.description: If the precipitation forecast (Raf) is greater than this value, irrigation is no longer activated via input (Act).

parameters.summary: Maximum rain duration in the last 24 hours
parameters.description: If it rained for longer than this time in total in the last 24 hours, irrigation is no longer activated via input (Act).
Duration of how long the valve is active until the next one is activated.
